F

FileFactory - Interface in basicFiles.fileFactories
Functional interface defining the contract for file factory implementations.
FileReader - Class in basicFiles.fileReaders
Abstract base class for file readers.
Folder - Class in basicFiles.files
Class representing a directory capable of containing files and other folders.
Folder(File, String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.Folder
Constructs a folder within a specific parent directory.
Folder(String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.Folder
Constructs a folder in the current working directory.
